videos.title: I Need to Help Quina Spawn Frogs
videos.description:
Quina is the resident Blue Mage from FFIX and we had to help Quina spawn a bunch of frogs through token generation!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-i-need-to-help-quina-spawn-frogs
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7239922#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/idJwW
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/Sjdug

videos.title: I Made Infinite Storm, Infinite Mana and Infinite Tokens in Standard  Against the Odds
videos.description:
What are the odds of generating infinite storm (and mana and black mage Wizard tokens) in Standard? Let's find out!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/against-the-odds-i-made-infinite-storm-infinite-mana-and-infinite-black-mages-in-standard
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7224487#paper
